changes.summary: Liability cap structure changed from symmetric mutual caps to asymmetric caps with Customer's liability uncapped and Provider's cap reduced to 6 months.
changes.original_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement is capped at the fees paid by Customer in the prior twelve (12) months. Neither party is liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages.
changes.redline_text: Customer's aggregate liability under this Agreement is uncapped. Provider's aggregate liability is capped at the fees paid by Customer in the prior six (6) months.
changes.rationale: Customer now faces unlimited liability exposure and loses protection against indirect/consequential damages, while Provider's liability remains capped and protected from such damages.
